debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
s : Set ℝ
hs : MeasurableSet s
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in s, exp x * f (exp x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in exp '' s, f y

failed_attempts:
rw [← integral_image_of_inverse_ae_exp]
  simp [hs]

rw [← integral_image_measurable_set (hf : Differentiable ℝ exp) hs (hmeas : Measurable exp)]
  simp [deriv_exp]

rw [← integral_image_measure (hf : Continuous exp) hs]
  simp [exp_pos]
rw [← image_integral_exp hs]

rw [← image_exp_Ici, ← image_exp_Iic, ← image_exp_univ] at *
  refine' integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_comp _ _ _
  · exact differentiable_exp.continuous
  · exact measurable_exp
  · simp [deriv_exp]

rw [← image_exp_eq_Ioi, ← image_exp_eq_Ioi] at *
  refine' integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul _ hs
  · exact differentiable_exp.continuous
  · exact differentiable_exp.measurable
  · simp [deriv_exp]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse hs (by continuity : Continuous exp)
      (by continuity : Continuous log) (by intro x; simp [exp_log]) (by intro x; simp [log_exp])]
  simp [mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse' hs (measurable_exp.exp) exp_ne_zero]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse hs (measurable_exp.exp) (by continuity) (by continuity)]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_measure (hf : Continuous exp) hs]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse (hf' := differentiable_exp.injective.measurableEmbedding)
      (h2f : ∀ x, deriv exp x = exp x) (h3f : ∀ x, exp x ≠ 0)]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_measure_map_exp]
  simp [map_exp, hs]

rw [← integral_image_measure (hf : Continuous exp) hs]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← image_exp_eq_Ioi, ← image_exp_eq_Ioi] at *
  refine' integral_image_of_monotone_ae _ _ _ _ <;> simp_all

rw [← image_exp_eq_Ioi, ← map_exp_volume]
  simp [volume_preserving_exp, hs]

rw [← integral_image_of_injective hs exp_injective]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse' (exp_ne_zero) (measurable_exp.continuous.measurableSet_image hs)
      (continuous_exp.injective) (continuous_exp.differentiableAt) (fun x => exp_ne_zero x)]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]
rw [← integral_image_comp_exp]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse hs (measurable_exp.exp) (differentiable_exp.injective)
      (by simp [deriv_exp]) (by simp [exp_ne_zero])]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_injective hs exp_injective (by continuity)]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse' (hf' := differentiable_exp.injective.measurableEmbedding)
      (hmeas := hs) (hdiff := differentiable_exp) (hderiv := fun x => exp_ne_zero x)]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse' (hf: Continuous exp) (hinv: Function.Injective exp)
      (hmeas: Measurable exp) hs]
  · simp [exp_ne_zero]
  · exact continuous_exp.injective
  · exact continuous_exp.measurable

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse hs (measurable_exp.exp) exp_pos
      (fun x => exp_ne_zero) (fun y hy => log_exp y)]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← image_exp_Ici, ← image_exp_Iic, ← image_exp_univ] at hs
  refine' integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_comp _ _ _
  · exact differentiable_exp.continuous
  · exact measurable_exp
  · simp [deriv_exp]

rw [← image_exp_eq_Ioi, ← image_exp_eq_Ioi] at *
  refine' integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul _ hs
  · exact differentiable_exp.continuous
  · exact measurable_exp
  · intro x
    simp [deriv_exp]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse' (hf: Continuous exp) (hg: Continuous log)
      (hfg: ∀ x, log (exp x) = x) (hgf: ∀ x ∈ exp '' s, exp (log x) = x)]
  all_goals simp [exp_pos]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse_ae_everywhere exp_ne_zero fun x => exp_ne_zero]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse' (hf: Continuous exp) (hinv: Function.Injective exp)
      (hmeas: Measurable exp) hs]
  · simp [exp_ne_zero]
  · exact continuous_exp.injective
  · exact continuous_exp.measurable

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse hs (differentiable_exp.exp_measurableEquiv.symm)
      (fun x => differentiable_exp.hasDerivAt x) (fun x => exp_ne_zero x)]
  simp [exp_ne_zero]

rw [← integral_image_of_inverse (hmeas := hs) (hdiff : Differentiable ℝ exp)
      (hinv : Function.Injective exp) (hcont : Continuous exp)]
  simp [exp_pos]
rw [← image_integral_exp hs]

rw [← image_exp_Ici, ← image_exp_Iic, ← image_exp_univ] at *
  refine' integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_comp _ _ hs
  · exact differentiable_exp.continuous
  · exact measurable_exp
  · simp [deriv_exp]
